title: Open All Night by The Snowflowers
lyrics: You know that place you gotta go Place where no one knows Be here if you need to I guess you know Open all night We're open all night Open all night Just check it out Check it out We're open all night Open all night I'm open all night Hoping you would die to mine Keeping up and open Keep my open up and open Keep my plans open Don't look at no one Don't believe nothing Just keep it open Cause I'm thinking of you I'm hoping you don't hear You know my store's open for you Baby you know the outlook Baby you know the outlook When you don't think of things positively And I see my love for you As positive as the positive get Through two doors of tears to negatives My heart for you it's open all night Come on man you know you just don't want You know your fear you know your fear It's open here for you anytime you want it Anytime you need it Just come over take a little time Give me a thought Sit there and see how it feels and unwind Just check it out Check it out We're open all night Open all night in our hearts It's dark but we set the light It's home for you baby We're open all night Open all night Why don't you just try something new Open the door Open your door We're open all night Open all night I tried to do that but here we go Come back baby come back come back I know you're not trying to be like that But just I'm just trying to tell you that I love you We're open all night You can come back whenever you want Try something new Open the door Let your spirit go We're open all night Open all night Baby  Open the door till you're high Till the start Till the moment you come and you can't go back Now you're in too deep but it's cool With doors open there's other people you meet Now everybody's sitting together Man they laughing they're clever And they know and they all know Exactly what the other one thinks Nobody see, pray, no click, hear or wait I just know, know if you know that's where peace comes from If you don't, come here, we'll tell you Open 24-7, you know, that's the deal Just open the door Right behind the door is your peace Right behind the door is your peace Her eyes cast all the lies

lyricsSegments.text: You know that place you gotta go Place where no one knows
Be here if you need to I guess you know Open all night
We're open all night Open all night
Just check it out Check it out
We're open all night Open all night
I'm open all night Hoping you would die to mine
Keeping up and open Keep my open up and open
Keep my plans open Don't look at no one
Don't believe nothing Just keep it open
Cause I'm thinking of you I'm hoping you don't hear
You know my store's open for you Baby you know the outlook
Baby you know the outlook When you don't think of things positively
And I see my love for you As positive as the positive get
Through two doors of tears to negatives My heart for you it's open all night
Come on man you know you just don't want You know your fear you know your fear
It's open here for you anytime you want it Anytime you need it
Just come over take a little time Give me a thought
Sit there and see how it feels and unwind
Just check it out Check it out
We're open all night Open all night in our hearts
It's dark but we set the light It's home for you baby
We're open all night Open all night
Why don't you just try something new Open the door
Open your door We're open all night
Open all night I tried to do that but here we go
Come back baby come back come back I know you're not trying to be like that
But just I'm just trying to tell you that I love you
We're open all night You can come back whenever you want
Try something new Open the door
Let your spirit go We're open all night
Open all night Baby
Open the door till you're high Till the start
Till the moment you come and you can't go back
Now you're in too deep but it's cool With doors open there's other people you meet
Now everybody's sitting together Man they laughing they're clever
And they know and they all know Exactly what the other one thinks
Nobody see, pray, no click, hear or wait I just know, know if you know that's where peace comes from
If you don't, come here, we'll tell you Open 24-7, you know, that's the deal
Just open the door Right behind the door is your peace
Right behind the door is your peace
Her eyes cast all the lies
